_comment: Copy this file to keys.json and fill in your API keys. keys.json is gitignored and must never be committed. Provider fallback order follows the order of keys in this dict — the first provider with a valid key is tried first.

anthropic._comment: Model must be a valid Anthropic model ID (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)

openai._comment: Model must be a valid OpenAI chat model ID (e.g. gpt-4o-mini)

gemini._comment: Model must be a valid Gemini model ID (e.g. gemini-1.5-flash)
